option.name: description
option.value: A set of 8-bit styled retro components. Works with your favorite frameworks. Open Source. Open Code.

option.name: description
option.value: A set of beautifully designed components designed for developers who want niche, high-utility UI elements that you won't find in standard libraries.

option.name: description
option.value: Primitives and components with serious attention to animation and design. Copy, own, ship.

option.name: description
option.value: Official Auth0 Universal Components for Web. Accelerate development with pre-built, embeddable UI for enterprise SSO, MFA, and organization management

option.name: description
option.value: A shadcn-compatible registry of reusable components, blocks, and utilities conforming to Vercel's components.build specification

option.name: description
option.value: A collection of React components for the most common crypto patterns

option.name: description
option.value: Animated, accessible UI components built with React and Tailwind CSS.

option.name: description
option.value: A modern component library built with Tailwind CSS and Motion for React, Aceternity UI contains unique and interactive components that can make your landing pages look 100x better.

option.name: description
option.value: This is a shadcn/ui component registry that distributes copy-paste React components for building LiveKit AI Agent interfaces.

option.name: description
option.value: A small collection of focused, production‑ready components and primitives for React/Next.js projects—built on shadcn/ui and complementary libraries.

option.name: description
option.value: AI components for the web. No server. No API keys. Built on WebLLM.

option.name: description
option.value: Pre-built components like conversations, messages and more to help you build AI-native applications faster.

option.name: description
option.value: Enterprises and developers use Algolia's AI search infrastructure to understand users and show them what they're looking for.

option.name: description
option.value: I create digital experiences that connect and inspire. I build apps, websites, brands, and products end-to-end.

option.name: description
option.value: A fully animated, open-source React component distribution. Browse a list of animated primitives, components and icons you can install and use in your projects.

option.name: description
option.value: Radix-style React primitives for AI chat with adapters for AI SDK, LangGraph, Mastra, and custom backends.

option.name: description
option.value: Open source React components for rendering AI tool call widgets and rich assistant outputs.

option.name: description
option.value: Simple and easy file uploads for React. Upload directly to any S3-compatible service with minimal setup.

option.name: description
option.value: Beautifully crafted shadcn/ui components powered by Base UI

option.name: description
option.value: BillingSDK is an open-source React and Next.js component library for SaaS billing and payments. It offers ready-to-use, customizable components for subscriptions, invoices, usage-based pricing and billing - fully compatible with Dodo Payments and Stripe.

option.name: description
option.value: A set of clean, modern application building blocks for you in your applications. Free and Open Source

option.name: description
option.value: Neubrutalism component library with 43 components, 42 SVG shapes, thick borders, and hard shadows. Supports React, Vue, and Nuxt. Built on shadcn/ui.

option.name: description
option.value: A collection of 150+ handcrafted UI components built with Tailwind CSS and shadcn/ui, covering marketing, e-commerce, dashboards, real estate, and more.

option.name: description
option.value: A set of beautifully-designed shadcn card components

option.name: description
option.value: A collection of beautiful, animated components to elevate your web projects instantly.

option.name: description
option.value: The easiest way to add authentication and user management to your application. Purpose-built for React, Next.js, Remix, and The Modern Web.

option.name: description
option.value: Shadcn UI Blocks for Ecommerce websites

option.name: description
option.value: A new, modern UI component library built on top of Base UI. Built for developers and AI.

option.name: description
option.value: A collection of open-source UI components, blocks and AI Agents. Integrate them in v0, Lovable, Claude or in your application.

option.name: description
option.value: Cult UI is a rare, curated set of shadcn-compatible, headless and composable components—tastefully animated with Framer Motion.

option.name: description
option.value: Accessible shadcn/ui components built with React, TypeScript, and Tailwind CSS. Copy-paste ready, and customizable.

option.name: description
option.value: A collection of beautiful, reusable component blocks built with React

option.name: description
option.value: Full-stack shadcn/ui components that go beyond UI. Add auth, monetization, uploads, and AI to your app in seconds.

option.name: description
option.value: A collection of Open Source agent and audio components that you can customize and extend.

option.name: description
option.value: A collection of beautifully crafted Shadcn/UI blocks, designed to help developers build modern websites with ease.

option.name: description
option.value: Beautiful, responsive Shadcn components with frosted glass morphism. Built for modern web applications with full dark mode support.

option.name: description
option.value: An open-source, modern UI component library for React, built with TypeScript, Tailwind CSS, and Framer Motion. Eldora UI offers beautifully crafted, reusable components designed for performance and elegance.

option.name: description
option.value: Build production-ready forms with a few clicks using shadcn components and modern tools.

option.name: description
option.value: Production-ready UI components designed for building beautiful AI assistants and conversational interfaces, from the team behind GAIA.

option.name: description
option.value: SolidJS port of shadcn-ui components built with Kobalte primitives. 57+ components with full TypeScript support and Vega theme.

option.name: description
option.value: A shadcn-ui compatible registry distributing 40+ glassmorphic React/TypeScript components with Apple-inspired design. Components include enhanced visual effects (glow, shimmer, ripple), theme support, and customizable glassmorphism styling.

option.name: description
option.value: A collection of customisable components to build Home Assistant dashboards.

option.name: description
option.value: Ready-to-use foundation components/blocks built on top of shadcn/ui.

option.name: description
option.value: A comprehensive React Hooks Collection built with Shadcn.

option.name: description
option.value: batteries-included agent components by inference.sh. chat interfaces with streaming, tool invocation rendering, syntax-highlighted code blocks, markdown renderer, and more.

option.name: description
option.value: Accessible React component library to copy, customize, and own your UI.

option.name: description
option.value: A curated collection of GitHub-integrated, documentation, and developer-facing components. Self-contained, zero-dependency, and production-ready.

option.name: description
option.value: Kibo UI is a custom registry of composable, accessible and open source components designed for use with shadcn/ui.

option.name: description
option.value: A set of perfect-designed components built on top of React Aria and Motion.

option.name: description
option.value: Cleanly designed components purposely built for open-source government portals.

option.name: description
option.value: Collection of stunning components built with Tailwind CSS, shadcn/ui and Motion to use on your websites.

option.name: description
option.value: A collection of social media components for use with Lens Social Protocol.

option.name: description
option.value: Modern UI Library for building media players in React. Powered by Shaka Player.

option.name: description
option.value: LMS components for building interactive learning experiences — quiz, flashcards, matching, fill-in-the-blank, word scramble, sequencing, reading comprehension, spaced repetition and more.

option.name: description
option.value: An open-source collection of smooth animated lucide icons for your projects

option.name: description
option.value: LyteNyte Grid is a high performance, light weight, headless, React data grid. Our registry provides LyteNyte Grid themed using Tailwind and the Shadcn theme variables.

option.name: description
option.value: UI Library for Design Engineers. 150+ free and open-source animated components and effects built with React, Typescript, Tailwind CSS, and Motion. Perfect companion for shadcn/ui.

option.name: description
option.value: Agentic UI toolkit for building MCP Apps. Open-source components and blocks ready to use within your chat app.

option.name: description
option.value: Beautiful maps, made simple. Ready to use, customizable map components for React. Built on MapLibre. Styled with Tailwind CSS.

option.name: description
option.value: A collection of hand-crafted interfaces built on top of MUI components

option.name: description
option.value: A modern React component library focused on intuitive interactions and seamless user experiences.

option.name: description
option.value: Beautifully designed motions components. Easy copy-paste. Customizable. Open Source. Built for engineers and designers.

option.name: description
option.value: Custom parsers, adapters and utilities from the community for type-safe URL state management.

option.name: description
option.value: A collection of neobrutalism-styled components based on shadcn/ui

option.name: description
option.value: Beautiful, accessible components built with Tailwind CSS v4 and Radix UI. Includes auth blocks, data tables, and TanStack Form integration.

option.name: description
option.value: Ready-made React components for almost any use case. Use as is or customise and go to market fast

option.name: description
option.value: Hand-crafted, accessible components for building beautiful status pages.

option.name: description
option.value: A design system that distributes re-styled components, utilities, and hooks ready to use.

option.name: description
option.value: React Aria Components with shadcn characteristics.Copy-and-paste react aria components that run side-by-side with shadcn components.

option.name: description
option.value: Carefully built UI blocks for real apps and dashboards, designed to integrate smoothly from early ideas to production releases.

option.name: description
option.value: Animated GSAP components crafted for smooth interaction and rich detail.

option.name: description
option.value: pastebin + shadcn = pastecn. Paste your code and get a shadcn-compatible registry URL instantly.

option.name: description
option.value: Unified payments SDK for builders — handle checkout, billing, and webhooks across Stripe, PayPal, Adyen, and regional gateways with a single integration.

option.name: description
option.value: AI-powered rich text editor for React.

option.name: description
option.value: Core building blocks for AI apps. High-quality, accessible, and customizable components for AI interfaces.

option.name: description
option.value: Powerful and flexible rich text editor for React, Vue, Preact, Svelte, and SolidJS.

option.name: description
option.value: A collection of modern React UI components with GSAP animations.

option.name: description
option.value: Customizable Tailwind and Vanilla CSS components with adaptive interactions, top-tier accessibility, and internationalization.

option.name: description
option.value: A large collection of animated, interactive & fully customizable React components for building memorable websites. From smooth text animations all the way to eye-catching backgrounds, you can find it here.

option.name: description
option.value: A Neobrutalism styled React + TailwindCSS UI library for building bold, modern web apps. Perfect for any project using Shadcn/ui.

option.name: description
option.value: Free & open-source library of 1,000+ components and patterns to 10x your productivity in shadcn projects.

option.name: description
option.value: ScrollX UI is an open-source React and shadcn-compatible component library for animated, interactive, and customizable user interfaces. It offers motion-driven components that blend seamlessly with modern ShadCN setups.

option.name: description
option.value: Beautiful, sophisticated UI components designed for modern React and Tailwind CSS applications.

option.name: description
option.value: Collection of beautifully crafted open-source layouts UI built with shadcn/ui.

option.name: description
option.value: UI component library, Designed for flexibility, built for customization, and crafted to scale across variants and use cases.

option.name: description
option.value: Roi UI is a library that offers UI components and blocks built with Base UI primitives. Some blocks and components use motion (framer). Everything is open-source and will be forever.

option.name: description
option.value: A component library to build slide decks using code.

option.name: description
option.value: A comprehensive suite of high-fidelity interaction components. It offers motion-driven components that designed with motion-react and tailwindcss, that blends seamlessly.

option.name: description
option.value: Production-ready and tastefully crafted sections, animated components, and full-page templates for Next.js, Tailwind CSS & Motion

option.name: description
option.value: A registry with hundreds of extra blocks for shadcn ui.

option.name: description
option.value: A growing collection of high-quality blocks and themes for shadcn/ui.

option.name: description
option.value: Beautiful map components powered by pure SVG.

option.name: description
option.value: A growing collection of shadcn/ui components, blocks, and templates for building modern web apps.

option.name: description
option.value: A map component for shadcn/ui. Built with Leaflet and React Leaflet.

option.name: description
option.value: An open-source set of shadcn/ui components, blocks, and templates with a powerful theme generator.

option.name: description
option.value: A collection of wave players and waveform components built with wavesurfer.js and shadcn/ui.

option.name: description
option.value: Accessible, Customizable, Rich Text Editor. Made with Lexical and Shadcn/UI. Open Source. Open Code.

option.name: description
option.value: A collection of premium, production-ready shadcn/ui blocks, components and templates.

option.name: description
option.value: Launch your projects faster with admin dashboards, website templates, components, blocks, and pre-built real-world examples.

option.name: description
option.value: A collection of polished shadcn/ui components and marketing blocks built to production standards. Fast to use, easy to extend, and ready for any modern web project.

option.name: description
option.value: A collection of beautifully crafted motion components built with React, Framer Motion, and TailwindCSS. Designed to elevate microinteractions, each component focuses on smooth animations, subtle feedback, and delightful UX. Perfect for designers and developers who want to add refined motion to their interfaces — copy, paste, and make your UI come alive.

option.name: description
option.value: A modern component library built with shadcn/ui and Tailwind CSS. Spectrum UI offers elegant, responsive components and smooth animations designed for high-quality interfaces.

option.name: description
option.value: A collection of React components and blocks built on the shadcn/ui library that connect your front-end to your Supabase back-end via a single command.

option.name: description
option.value: A beautiful library with SVG logos.

option.name: description
option.value: Shadcn blocks designed for building modern marketing websites.

option.name: description
option.value: Beautifully designed, accessible components that you can copy and paste into your apps. Made with React Aria Components and Shadcn tokens.

option.name: description
option.value: Composable, animated map components for React. Built with TypeScript, Tailwind CSS, Mapbox GL JS, and MapLibre GL. Perfect companion for shadcn/ui.

option.name: description
option.value: A Tron-inspired shadcn/ui theme system with Greek god color schemes, glow intensity levels, and sci-fi components like DataCard, HUD, Radar, and more.

option.name: description
option.value: A component for building onboarding tours. Designed to integrate with shadcn/ui.

option.name: description
option.value: An open-source, Production-ready UI components and blocks powered by shadcn/ui and Framer Motion

option.name: description
option.value: Fullstack registry items to start those big features. Utilcn has ChatGPT Apps, file uploading (with progress bars) and downloading, and a way to make your env vars typesafe on the backend.

option.name: description
option.value: A set of open source fully controlled React Inertia form elements

option.name: description
option.value: A collection of accessible components built for use with Shadcn.

option.name: description
option.value: A beautiful collection of copy-and-paste widgets for your next project.

option.name: description
option.value: Expertly crafted blocks, components & themes for shadcn/ui.

option.name: description
option.value: A curated collection of components that spark joy. Featuring interactive concepts, design experiments, and components in the intersection of AI/UI.

option.name: description
option.value: UI Layouts offers components, effects, design tools, and ready-made blocks that make building modern interfaces more efficient—built with React, Next.js, Tailwind CSS, and shadcn/ui.

option.name: description
option.value: Pure UI is a curated collection of refined, animated, and accessible components built with Base UI, Tailwind CSS, Motion, and other high-quality open source libraries.

option.name: description
option.value: Tailwind Builder is a collection of free ui blocks and components and provide ai tools to generate production-ready forms, tables, and charts in seconds. Built with React, Next.js, Tailwind & ShadCN.

option.name: description
option.value: Tailwind Builder provides free tailwind admin dashboard templates, components and ui-blocks built with React, Next.js, Tailwind CSS, and shadcn/ui to help you build admin panels quickly and efficiently.

option.name: description
option.value: Beautifully designed components that you can copy and paste into your apps. Accessible. Customizable. Open Source.

option.name: description
option.value: Brand new uncommon components for your Next.js project. Use with ease through shadcn CLI 3.0, featuring fast-growing components and collections that are easy to edit and use.

option.name: description
option.value: AnimBits is a collection animated UI components for React that use Framer Motion. The components provided include buttons, cards, text, icons, lists, loaders, and page transitions, animation hooks all of which have general-purpose effects that are not flashy and easy on the eyes, making them easy to use.

option.name: description
option.value: ShadcnSpace is a collection of extra-ordinary, highly customizable shadcn/ui components, blocks, and themes to build modern UIs with speed and clarity.

option.name: description
option.value: ShadcnDashboard is a collection of modern, production-ready dashboard layouts, components, and UI patterns built on top of shadcn/ui and Tailwind CSS. It’s designed to help developers build clean, scalable, and data-driven dashboards faster—without compromising on performance, accessibility, or customization.

option.name: description
option.value: An open-source library of meticulously animated icons (Tabler, Phosphor, and more) for your projects, inspired by lucide-animated.com

option.name: description
option.value: An open-source collection of 316 beautifully animated heroicons for your projects.

option.name: description
option.value: Magic 3D Tabs component featuring mouse-interactive 3D rotation, floating particles background effect, and smooth spring animations.

option.name: description
option.value: Production-ready UI blocks for landing pages, dashboards, and web apps.

option.name: description
option.value: Beautiful, interactive documentation components for your design tokens following industry standards.

option.name: description
option.value: Composable React components powered by Base UI and Tailwind CSS — Build fast, customize everything.

option.name: description
option.value: A collection of premium animated React components and micro-interactions built with Motion for building fluid, professional interfaces.

option.name: description
option.value: Components including MobileMenu, ScrollArea with gradients, Chat UI, HLSVideoPlayer, and Marquee.

option.name: description
option.value: Open source component library with animated components, beautiful effects, and custom toast notifications. Built with Radix UI and Tailwind CSS.

option.name: description
option.value: A collection of components built on React Aria, Tailwind CSS, and tailwind-variants.

option.name: description
option.value: JolyUI is a modern React component library built with TypeScript and Tailwind CSS.

option.name: description
option.value: A collection of beautifully designed UI components for building modern web applications.

option.name: description
option.value: Clean, beautiful, and simple UI primitives and AI elements.

option.name: description
option.value: A Minimalistic Web CMS for Next.js, optimized for Cache Components.

option.name: description
option.value: Typedora UI is a next-generation extension layer for shadcn/ui, designed to bring full type-safety to your UI components.

option.name: description
option.value: A modern UI component library built with React and TailwindCSS to help you build beautiful and accessible web applications faster.

option.name: description
option.value: Large collection of game, interface, retro, and voice sound effects for web applications

option.name: description
option.value: Playful pixel art style components library built on top of shadcn. Perfect for retro style projects and games.

option.name: description
option.value: Emerald UI - collection of components built with Motion, GSAP, Tailwind CSS and shadcn/ui.

option.name: description
option.value: Iconiq is a collection of icons designed for web applications. It is a modern, clean, and minimalistic icon set that is perfect for web applications.

option.name: description
option.value: Curated font pairing registry for shadcn. Three fonts. One command. Install perfectly configured typography (heading + body + mono) with shadcn add. Includes editorial-grade type scales, CSS variables, and a live preview site.

option.name: description
option.value: Beautiful, interactive React + Tailwind components for modern product UIs.

option.name: description
option.value: Curated OKLCH color themes for shadcn/ui + visual theme editor with CSS, Tailwind v4, and Figma export.

option.name: description
option.value: Fluid components used exclusively in service of functional clarity. Proximity hover, spring animations, font-weight transitions, and animated focus rings.

option.name: description
option.value: Beautifully designed landing page components built with React & Tailwind CSS & Motion.

option.name: description
option.value: A collection of customizable UI blocks with interactive live previews

option.name: description
option.value: Open-source component library of composable, copy-paste primitives for building AI interfaces (chat, streaming, multimodal)

option.name: description
option.value: Legacy skeuomorphic UI components and blocks for shadcn.

option.name: desc
option.value: A vertically stacked set of interactive headings that each reveal a section of content.

option.name: desc
option.value: Displays a callout for user attention with optional glassy variant.

option.name: desc
option.value: An image element with a fallback for representing the user.

option.name: desc
option.value: A modal dialog that interrupts the user with important content and expects a response.

option.name: desc
option.value: Displays a badge or a component that looks like a badge with glassy variant.

option.name: desc
option.value: Displays the path to the current resource using a hierarchy of links.

option.name: desc
option.value: Displays a button or a component that looks like a button with glassy variants.

option.name: desc
option.value: A date field component that allows users to enter and edit date.

option.name: desc
option.value: Displays a card with optional glassy variant.

option.name: desc
option.value: A carousel component with glassy variants.

option.name: desc
option.value: Chart components built with Recharts with optional glassy variant.

option.name: desc
option.value: A control that allows the user to toggle between checked and not checked with optional glassy variant.

option.name: desc
option.value: An interactive component which expands/collapses a panel.

option.name: desc
option.value: Fast, composable, unstyled command menu for React.

option.name: desc
option.value: A context menu component with glassy variants.

option.name: desc
option.value: A drawer component for mobile with optional glassy variant.

option.name: desc
option.value: A window overlaid on either the primary window or another dialog window, rendering the content underneath inert.

option.name: desc
option.value: Displays a menu to the user — such as a set of actions or functions — triggered by a button with optional glassy variant.

option.name: desc
option.value: Displays a form input field with optional glassy variant.

option.name: desc
option.value: For sighted users to preview content available behind a link.

option.name: desc
option.value: Accessible one-time password component with copy paste functionality.

option.name: desc
option.value: A collection of links for navigating websites.

option.name: desc
option.value: Renders an accessible label associated with controls.

option.name: desc
option.value: Pagination with page navigation with optional glassy variant.

option.name: desc
option.value: Displays rich content in a portal, triggered by a button with optional glassy variant.

option.name: desc
option.value: A set of checkable buttons—known as radio buttons—where no more than one of the buttons can be checked at a time with optional glassy variant.

option.name: desc
option.value: Augments native scroll functionality for custom, cross-browser styling.

option.name: desc
option.value: Displays a list of options for the user to pick from—triggered by a button with optional glassy variant.

option.name: desc
option.value: Visually or semantically separates content with optional glassy variant.

option.name: desc
option.value: Extends the Dialog component to display content that complements the main content of the screen.

option.name: desc
option.value: Use to show a placeholder while content is loading with optional glassy variant.

option.name: desc
option.value: An opinionated toast component for React.

option.name: desc
option.value: An input where the user selects a value from within a given range.

option.name: desc
option.value: A sidebar component with optional glassy variant.

option.name: desc
option.value: A responsive table component with optional glassy variant.

option.name: desc
option.value: Displays a form textarea with optional glassy variant.

option.name: desc
option.value: A two-state button that can be either on or off.

option.name: desc
option.value: A set of layered sections of content—known as tab panels—that are displayed one at a time with optional glassy variant.

option.name: desc
option.value: A set of two-state buttons that can be toggled on or off.

option.name: desc
option.value: A control that allows the user to toggle between checked and not checked with optional glassy variant.

option.name: desc
option.value: A popup that displays information related to an element when the element receives keyboard focus or the mouse hovers over it with optional glassy variant.

option.name: desc
option.value: A spotlight effect that follows your mouse cursor and highlights borders on hover.

option.name: desc
option.value: A mockup of an Android device.

option.name: desc
option.value: A card with a time warping background effect.

option.name: desc
option.value: A text component with a moving line shadow.

option.name: desc
option.value: A dynamic text morphing component for Magic UI.

option.name: desc
option.value: Animated Scroll Progress for your pages

option.name: desc
option.value: A interactive component that enables zooming into images, videos and other elements.

option.name: desc
option.value: A component that displays a pointer when hovering over an element

option.name: desc
option.value: A customizable, physics-based smooth cursor animation component with spring animations and rotation effects

option.name: desc
option.value: The Progressive Blur component adds a smooth blur gradient effect to scrollable content, indicating more content below or above.

option.name: desc
option.value: A background grid pattern made with SVGs, fully customizable using Tailwind CSS.

option.name: desc
option.value: A background striped pattern made with SVGs, fully customizable using Tailwind CSS.

option.name: desc
option.value: A interactive background grid pattern made with SVGs, fully customizable using Tailwind CSS.

option.name: desc
option.value: A background dot pattern made with SVGs, fully customizable using Tailwind CSS.

option.name: desc
option.value: A flickering grid background made with SVGs, fully customizable using Tailwind CSS.

option.name: desc
option.value: A component which compares two code snippets.

option.name: desc
option.value: An infinite scrolling component that can be used to display text, images, or videos.

option.name: desc
option.value: An autorotating, interactive, and highly performant globe made using WebGL.

option.name: desc
option.value: A button with a shimmering light which travels around the perimeter.

option.name: desc
option.value: A card that displays a tweet with the author's name, handle, and profile picture.

option.name: desc
option.value: A client-side version of the tweet card that displays a tweet with the author's name, handle, and profile picture.

option.name: desc
option.value: Bento grid is a layout used to showcase the features of a product in a simple and elegant way.

option.name: desc
option.value: Particles are a fun way to add some visual flair to your website. They can be used to create a sense of depth, movement, and interactivity.

option.name: desc
option.value: Animate numbers to count up or down to a target number

option.name: desc
option.value: An animated ripple effect typically used behind elements to emphasize them.

option.name: desc
option.value: An animated scrolling retro grid effect

option.name: desc
option.value: A list that animates each item in sequence with a delay. Used to showcase notifications or events on your landing page.

option.name: desc
option.value: A light glare effect which pans across text making it appear as if it is shimmering.

option.name: desc
option.value: A animated background grid pattern made with SVGs, fully customizable using Tailwind CSS.

option.name: desc
option.value: An animated beam of light which travels along the border of its container.

option.name: desc
option.value: An animated beam of light which travels along a path. Useful for showcasing the integration features of a website.

option.name: desc
option.value: Fade in text as you scroll down the page.

option.name: desc
option.value: A text animation that scrambles letters before revealing the final text.

option.name: desc
option.value: An animated gradient background which transitions between colors for text.

option.name: desc
option.value: A collection of circles which move in orbit along a circular path

option.name: desc
option.value: An implementation of the MacOS dock using react + tailwindcss + motion

option.name: desc
option.value: A dynamic text that generates continuous sparkles with smooth transitions, perfect for highlighting text with animated stars.

option.name: desc
option.value: The Spinning Text component animates text in a circular motion with customizable speed, direction, color, and transitions for dynamic and engaging effects.

option.name: desc
option.value: A text animation component that animates text using a variety of different animations.

option.name: desc
option.value: Scrolling text whose speed changes based on scroll speed

option.name: desc

option.value: A looping logo marquee component with horizontal and vertical motion, hover effects, fading edges, and responsive behavior.

option.name: desc
option.value: An interactive cloud architecture visualization component featuring animated SVG flow paths, glowing data particles, node badges, and a central hub with layered motion effects—ideal for showcasing distributed systems, API traffic, and real-time infrastructure flows.

option.value: A fully animated CPU architecture SVG component with dynamic paths, gradients, and optional CPU connections.

option.value: Animated ShadCN UI SVG with glowing masked paths, motion shapes, and dynamic shimmering text with customizable props.

option.value: A window overlaid on either the primary window or another dialog window.

option.value: Displays a menu to the user — such as a set of actions or functions — triggered by a button.

option.value: For sighted users to preview content available behind a link.

option.value: Displays a form input field or a component that looks like an input.

option.value: Displays a menu to the user triggered by a right click or a long press.

option.value: Renders an accessible label associated with controls.

option.name: desc
option.value: Pagination with page navigation, next and previous links.

option.name: desc
option.value: A set of checkable buttons—known as radio buttons.

option.value: Accessible resizable panel groups and layouts.

option.value: A visually persistent menu common in desktop applications.

option.value: Displays an indicator showing the completion progress of a task.

option.value: Augments native scroll functionality for custom, cross-browser styling.

option.value: A composable sidebar component with desktop and mobile support.

option.value: Use to show a placeholder while content is loading.

option.value: An input where the user selects a value from within a given range.

option.value: A control that allows the user to toggle between checked and unchecked states.

option.name: desc
option.value: A two-state button that can be either on or off.

option.name: desc
option.value: Displays a form textarea field or a component that looks like a textarea.

option.name: desc
option.value: A set of layered sections of content—known as tab panels.

option.value: A set of two-state buttons that can be toggled on or off.

option.value: A popup that displays information related to an element.

option.value: Data table component with status badges, hover states, and action buttons. Perfect for user management, application tracking, and directory listings.

option.value: A set of collapsible panels with headings.

option.value: A dialog that requires user response to proceed.

option.value: Displays a small count or status indicator.

option.value: Displays the path to the current resource using a hierarchy of links.

option.value: Displays content inside a themed container.

option.value: A button component that can be rendered as another tag or focusable when disabled.

option.name: desc
option.value: A collapsible panel controlled by a button.

option.name: desc
option.value: A menu that appears at the pointer on right click or long press.

option.name: desc
option.value: A list of actions in a dropdown, enhanced with keyboard navigation.

option.name: desc
option.value: An overlay panel that slides from the viewport edge.

option.name: desc
option.value: A native input element that automatically works with Field.

option.value: A native form element with consolidated error handling.

option.name: desc
option.value: A popup that opens on top of the entire page.

option.value: A menu bar providing commands and options for your application.

option.value: Renders an accessible label associated with controls.

option.name: desc
option.value: An accessible popup anchored to a button.

option.name: desc
option.value: A collection of links and menus for website navigation.

option.name: desc
option.value: Displays the status of a task that takes a long time.

option.name: desc
option.value: Accessible resizable panel groups and layouts with keyboard support.

option.name: desc
option.value: A common form component for choosing a predefined value in a dropdown menu.

option.name: desc
option.value: A native scroll container with custom scrollbars.

option.name: desc
option.value: A separator element accessible to screen readers.

option.value: Extends the Dialog component to display content that complements the main content of the screen.

option.name: desc
option.value: A control that indicates whether a setting is on or off.

option.name: desc
option.value: A placeholder used while content is loading.

option.name: desc
option.value: A component for toggling between related panels on the same page.

option.name: desc
option.value: Provides a shared state to a series of toggle buttons.

option.value: A popup that appears when an element is hovered or focused, showing a hint for sighted users.

option.name: desc
option.value: A two-state button that can be on or off.

option.value: A badge component with multiple color variants and sizes.

option.name: desc
option.value: A swipe row for providing actions of swipe of left and right

option.name: desc
option.value: A component for displaying nested discussions or comment threads.

option.name: desc
option.value: A customizable spinning circle loader component for indicating loading states in your application. Features smooth animations and optional loading messages.

option.name: desc
option.value: A customizable morphing square loader component for indicating loading states in your application. Features smooth shape transitions and optional loading messages.

option.name: desc
option.value: A customizable orbital loader component for indicating loading states in your application. Features smooth orbital animations and optional loading messages.

option.name: desc
option.value: A customizable typewriter loader component for indicating loading states in your application. Features smooth typing animations and customizable text content.

option.name: desc
option.value: An animated collapsible profile menu component with smooth transitions and customizable content sections.

option.name: desc
option.value: An animated checkbox component with smooth transitions and hover effects built on Radix UI primitives.

option.name: desc
option.value: An animated loading indicator featuring three bouncing dots with customizable colors and spacing.

option.name: desc
option.value: An animated loading indicator featuring vertical bars that scale up and down in a wave-like pattern to indicate loading states.

option.name: desc
option.value: An interactive voice recording interface with animated visual feedback, timer display, and customizable start/stop callbacks.

option.name: desc
option.value: A button that smoothly transitions between collapsed and expanded states using spring animations. Shows only an icon when collapsed and reveals text alongside the icon when expanded, perfect for responsive layouts and space-saving interfaces.

option.name: desc
option.value: A glassmorphic button component with backdrop blur effects and liquid-like visual styling for modern interfaces.

option.name: desc
option.value: A visually striking dialog component with 3D warp animations and smooth transitions. Features perspective transformations, animated backgrounds, and spring-based motion effects for an immersive user experience.

option.name: desc
option.value: A text animation component that smoothly rotates through an array of words with customizable duration and motion effects.

option.name: desc
option.value: A collapsible content component with smooth animations, built on Radix UI primitives and enhanced with Framer Motion for fluid transitions.

option.name: desc
option.value: A pop-up layered above the application window or dialog, which makes the background content inert.

option.value: A control that allows the user to toggle between checked and not checked.

option.name: desc
option.value: An interactive component which expands/collapses a panel.

option.name: desc
option.value: Beautiful and responsive charts built with Recharts.

option.name: desc
option.value: A date picker component with range and presets.

option.name: desc
option.value: A window overlaid on the primary window.

option.name: desc
option.value: A command menu with search and keyboard navigation.

option.name: desc
option.value: A powerful data table with sorting, filtering, pagination, row selection and faceted filters.

option.name: desc
option.value: A drawer component for mobile-friendly navigation and content.

option.name: desc
option.value: Displays a menu to the user with a list of actions or options.

option.name: desc
option.value: Form field components for building accessible forms with TanStack Form.

option.name: desc
option.value: Renders an accessible label associated with controls.

option.name: desc
option.value: For sighted users to preview content available behind a link.

option.name: desc
option.value: Accessible one-time password input with copy/paste support.

option.name: desc
option.value: A set of checkable buttons where only one can be checked at a time.

option.name: desc
option.value: Pagination with page navigation, next and previous links.

option.name: desc
option.value: Displays rich content in a portal, triggered by a button.

option.name: desc
option.value: Augments native scroll functionality for custom, cross-browser styling.

option.name: desc
option.value: Displays an indicator showing the completion progress of a task.

option.name: desc
option.value: Use to show a placeholder while content is loading.

option.name: desc
option.value: A composable, themeable and customizable sidebar component.

option.name: desc
option.value: Extends the Dialog component to display content that complements the main content of the screen.

option.name: desc
option.value: Displays a list of options for the user to pick from.

option.name: desc
option.value: An input where the user selects a value from within a given range.

option.name: desc
option.value: A control that allows the user to toggle between on and off.

option.name: desc
option.value: An opinionated toast component for React.

option.name: desc
option.value: A set of layered sections of content, known as tab panels.

option.name: desc
option.value: A responsive table component for displaying data.

option.name: desc
option.value: A set of two-state buttons that can be toggled on or off.

option.name: desc
option.value: A popup that displays information related to an element.

option.name: desc
option.value: A two-state button that can be either on or off.

option.name: desc
option.value: Small status indicator with variants for labels, tags, and status.

option.name: desc
option.value: Displays a card with header, content, and footer.

option.name: desc
option.value: Displays a button or a component that looks like a button.

option.name: desc
option.value: A zero-dependency carousel with drag-to-scroll, auto-play, and accessible navigation built on CSS scroll-snap.

option.name: desc
option.value: A checkbox with smooth SVG path animation when checked.

option.name: desc
option.value: Renders an accessible label associated with controls.

option.name: desc
option.value: Range slider input component with customizable styling.

option.name: desc
option.value: Toast notification component with theming support.

option.name: desc
option.value: Displays a textarea for multiline text input.

option.name: desc
option.value: Helper functions to show custom toast notifications.

option.name: desc
option.value: An accordion allows users to toggle the display of sections of content. Each accordion consists of a header with a title and content area.

option.name: desc
option.value: A badge is a small label that can be used to display information or status.

option.name: desc
option.value: A button allows a user to perform an action, with mouse, touch, and keyboard interactions.

option.name: desc
option.value: A calendar displays one or more date grids and allows users to select either a single date or a contiguous range of dates.

option.name: desc
option.value: Displays a card with header, content, and footer.

option.name: desc
option.value: A checkbox allows a user to select multiple items from a list of individual items, or to mark one individual item as selected.

option.name: desc
option.value: A command palette that allows users to quickly search and execute commands using keyboard shortcuts.

option.name: desc
option.value: A date picker combines one or more DateFields with a calendar popover, allowing users to enter or select a single date/time or a range.

option.name: desc
option.value: Allows a user to enter a plain text value with a keyboard.

option.name: desc
option.value: A popover is an overlay element positioned relative to a trigger.

option.name: desc
option.value: A radio group allows a user to select a single option from a list of mutually exclusive options.

option.name: desc
option.value: A select displays a collapsible list of options and allows a user to select one of them.

option.name: desc
option.value: A slider allows a user to select one or more values within a range.

option.name: desc
option.value: A switch allows a user to turn a setting on or off.

option.name: desc
option.value: Tabs organize content into multiple sections and allow users to navigate between them.

option.name: desc
option.value: A table displays data in rows and columns and enables a user to navigate its contents via directional navigation keys, and optionally supports row selection and sorting.

option.name: desc
option.value: A toggle button allows a user to toggle a selection on or off, for example switching between two states or modes.

option.name: desc
option.value: A tooltip displays a description of an element on hover or focus.

option.name: desc
option.value: Data table with columns, rows, and optional actions or badges.

option.name: desc
option.value: A button component with multiple variants and sizes.

option.name: desc
option.value: A tooltip component for displaying contextual information.

option.name: desc
option.value: Collapsible accordion with animated height transitions, spring-animated chevron, and proximity hover in grouped mode. Built on Radix UI Accordion.

option.name: desc
option.value: Animated button with variants (primary, secondary, tertiary, ghost), icon support, loading spinner, and fluid font-weight transitions on hover.

option.name: desc
option.value: Compact label with solid and dot variants, Tailwind color palette, and three sizes.

option.name: desc
option.value: Animated modal dialog with spring-based scale and opacity transitions. Built on Radix UI Dialog with overlay, header, footer, title, and description sub-components.

option.name: desc
option.value: Animated radio group with proximity hover, spring-animated selection dot, and optional Radix UI integration. Supports both controlled index and value-based APIs.

option.name: desc
option.value: Animated select menu with proximity hover, bordered/borderless variants, optional leading icons, spring-animated popover, and animated checkmark indicator.

option.name: desc
option.value: Animated slider with spring-snapped thumb, step dots, range mode, and click-to-edit value display. Built on Radix UI Slider.

option.name: desc
option.value: Animated toggle switch with spring-based thumb animation and fluid font-weight label transitions. Built on Radix UI Switch.

option.name: desc
option.value: Animated table with proximity-based row hover highlighting and fluid border transitions. Includes TableHeader, TableBody, TableRow, TableHead, and TableCell sub-components.

option.name: desc
option.value: Floating tooltip with spring-based animations, configurable placement, and rich content support.

option.name: desc
option.value: Data table with optional single or multi-select modes for chat interfaces.

option.name: desc
option.value: Core map component with Mapbox GL and MapLibre GL support.

option.name: desc
option.value: Customizable map markers with popup support.

option.name: desc
option.value: Info popups and tooltips for map locations.

option.name: desc
option.value: Animated marker that moves along a path with trail visualization.

option.name: desc
option.value: Static routes and paths on the map.

option.name: desc
option.value: Animated path and route animations on the map.

option.name: desc
option.value: Pulsing dot animation for map markers.

option.name: desc
option.value: Video overlay layers on the map.

option.name: desc
option.value: Image overlay layers on the map.

option.name: desc
option.value: Synchronized multi-map component with bidirectional movement sync.

option.name: desc
option.value: Animated curved arc between two points for flights, deliveries, and connections.

option.name: desc
option.value: Animate camera along a path for immersive fly-through experiences.

option.name: desc
option.value: Draggable geographic circle with customizable fill and stroke.

option.name: desc
option.value: Animated circle with drawing and fill effects.

option.name: desc
option.value: Blur sensitive areas on the map with customizable styling.

option.name: desc
option.value: Military-style targeting brackets with tracking and lock-on capabilities.

option.name: desc
option.value: Animated radar sweep signal overlay on map coordinates.

option.name: desc
option.value: Text watermark overlay for maps with configurable position and styling.

option.name: desc
option.value: Interactive compass overlay with bearing display and click-to-reset.

option.name: desc
option.value: Radial lines from a center point to multiple destinations with optional markers.

option.name: desc
option.value: Geographic polygon with customizable fill and stroke styling.

option.name: desc
option.value: Animated polygon with draw, fill, and draw-then-fill effects.

option.name: desc
option.value: Thematic choropleth map with color-coded regions based on data values.

option.name: desc
option.value: Animated footprint steps that walk along a path on the map.

option.name: desc
option.value: Realistic animated fire effect with particle simulation.

option.name: desc
option.value: Animated explosion burst effect with radial particles and flash.

option.name: desc
option.value: Animated cyclone funnel with swirling particles and debris.

option.name: desc
option.value: Rotating music disc with floating notes animation.

option.name: desc
option.value: Rising steam effect with wispy particle animation.

option.name: desc
option.value: Animated tsunami wave effect with incoming wave, crashing foam, and debris.

option.name: desc
option.value: Atmospheric sandstorm effect with horizontal particle movement and reduced visibility.

option.name: desc
option.value: Falling snowflakes effect with gentle drift and wind.

option.name: desc
option.value: Animated meteor falling from sky with fiery trail and impact effect.

option.name: desc
option.value: Animated lightning bolt strikes with branching and flash effects.

option.name: desc
option.value: Coordinate grid overlay with latitude/longitude lines and labels.

option.name: desc
option.value: The calendar view displays features on a grid calendar. Specifically it shows the end date of each feature, and groups features by day.

option.name: desc
option.value: Table views are used to display data in a tabular format. They are useful for displaying large amounts of data in a structured way.

option.name: desc
option.value: A clean set of badge components with an edible look.

option.name: desc
option.value: A variety of clean cards, from minimal to flashy.

option.name: desc
option.value: A simple input component with a tactile feel.

option.name: desc
option.value: An input that can increase in height to accommodate more text.

option.name: desc
option.value: A button component that *feels* good to use.

option.name: desc
option.value: The `Accordion` component allows you to toggle the visibility of content sections. It is useful for FAQs, menus, and more.

option.name: desc
option.value: Dismissible system alerts with success, error, warning, and info variants. Uses Framer Motion for enter/exit and optional auto-dismiss bar.

option.name: desc
option.value: Animated Bar, Line, and Area chart with variant dropdown. Uses Recharts and Framer Motion. Colors defined in component.

option.name: desc
option.value: An animated range slider with shimmer, hover/drag feedback, and optional floating value tooltip. Uses Radix UI and Framer Motion.

option.name: desc
option.value: Animated dropdown select with spring open/close and optional label. Uses Framer Motion and Lucide icons.

option.name: desc
option.value: An animated tooltip with spring enter/exit, optional delay, and placement (top, bottom, left, right). Uses Framer Motion.

option.name: desc
option.value: Animated tabs with a sliding indicator. Variants: spotlight, underline, chip. Uses Framer Motion LayoutGroup.

option.name: desc
option.value: Switch with an attached Entity trigger

option.name: desc
option.value: Helper to extract item config from a payload.
